label: Province
description: Province name

label: Health zone
description: Zone de Santé (health zone) name

label: Geometry
description: Geographic boundary of the health zone

label: Population under 1
description: Population count of children under 1 year old (0-12 months), from GRID3 raster data

label: Population under 5
description: Population count of children under 5 years old, from GRID3 raster data

label: Infant mortality rate
description: Infant mortality rate per 1,000 live births, province-level estimate

label: Live births per year
description: Estimated number of live births per year, computed as pop_0_12mo / (1 - imr / 1000)

label: Population 6-12 months
description: Estimated population of children aged 6-12 months (half of pop_0_12mo)

label: Population 12-24 months
description: Estimated population of children aged 12-24 months (25% of the 1-5 year old population)

label: Population 6-24 months
description: Estimated population of children aged 6-24 months (sum of pop_6_12mo and pop_12_24mo)

label: Predicted zero dose (pentavalent)
description: Predicted proportion of zero dose children based on pentavalent vaccine uptake

label: Predicted zero dose count (pentavalent)
description: Predicted number of zero dose children (pentavalent) in the 6-24 months population

label: Predicted zero dose (all vaccines)
description: Predicted proportion of zero dose children based on uptake of all vaccines

label: Predicted zero dose count (all vaccines)
description: Predicted number of zero dose children (all vaccines) in the 6-24 months population

label: Predicted BCG uptake
description: Predicted proportion of children vaccinated with BCG (vaccine against Tuberculosis)

label: Predicted BCG count
description: Predicted number of children vaccinated with BCG in the 6-24 months population

label: Predicted rotavirus uptake
description: Predicted proportion of children vaccinated with rotavirus vaccine

label: Predicted rotavirus count
description: Predicted number of children vaccinated with rotavirus vaccine in the 6-24 months population

label: Predicted measles uptake
description: Predicted proportion of children vaccinated with measles vaccine

label: Predicted measles count
description: Predicted number of children vaccinated with measles vaccine in the 6-24 months population

label: Predicted yellow fever uptake
description: Predicted proportion of children vaccinated with yellow fever vaccine

label: Predicted yellow fever count
description: Predicted number of children vaccinated with yellow fever vaccine in the 6-24 months population

label: Predicted polio uptake
description: Predicted proportion of children vaccinated with polio vaccine

label: Predicted polio count
description: Predicted number of children vaccinated with polio vaccine in the 6-24 months population

label: Predicted pneumococcal uptake
description: Predicted proportion of children vaccinated with pneumococcal vaccine (against Streptococcus pneumoniae)

label: Predicted pneumococcal count
description: Predicted number of children vaccinated with pneumococcal vaccine in the 6-24 months population

label: Antenne
description: Name of the antenne associated with the health zone

label: Is antenne
description: Whether the health zone is an antenne
